name: wan-huiyan-ml-feature-evaluator
description: Marketplace for ML feature lifecycle skills: go/no-go feature evaluation + post-retrain scoring-drift debugging.

plugins.name: ml-feature-evaluator
plugins.description: Structured 12-step diagnostic for go/no-go feature evaluation in production ML pipelines.

plugins.name: ml-scoring-select-drift
plugins.description: Diagnose "KeyError: [feat_a, ...] not in index" after a retrain bundle. Covers asymmetric train/score loaders, silent if-col-in-df guards, and Dataform incremental CREATE-TABLE-IF-NOT-EXISTS schema trap. Four permanent defenses + CI parity-test spec.
